description: Nearest User Foot is a protoflux node that returns the closest user foot to a slot and the foot's user, or closest to the root if not provided a slot. This will also ignore the user provided to IgnoreUser (User).

fields.Reference: The slot which to use as a point to find the closest foot to.
fields.IgnoreUser: The user to ignore when looking for the nearest foot.
fields.IgnoreAFK: Will not return a foot position from a user that is not currently focused into the world.
fields.GetLeft: Whether to get the left foot if closest, true by default.
fields.GetRight: Whether to get the right foot if closest, true by default.
fields.Slot: The slot of the foot when found.
fields.User: The user of the foot that was found.
fields.Distance: How far away the found foot was.
fields.Chirality: The side of the foot that was found. Left or Right or -1.
